reference: I just found out I have human papillomavirus and may have cervical cancer. Hi, I haven't been diagnosed with cervical cancer yet, but I am having a test to check if I have it on March first because they found some cells in my Pap test that look like I may have it, and I have human papillomavirus. I have been feeling really weak and faint all day. I have already eaten dinner, and I am still feeling really weak and now having sharp pains in my pelvic area. What should I do? My mom is urging me to go to the hospital.
text: I just found out I have human papilloma virus and may have cervical cancer. Hi, I haven't been diagnosed with cervical cancer yet, but I am having a test to check if I have it on March one because they found some cells in my Pap test that look like I may have it, and I have human papilloma virus. I have been feeling really weak and faint all day. I have already eaten dinner and I am still feeling really weak and now having sharp pains in my pelvic area. What should I do? My mom is urging me to go to the hospital.
